cross_port_instance_isolation.description: Servers on different ports (3000 vs 3002) maintain separate instance maps causing data isolation

technical_details.simple_backend_instances: Map<string, InstanceRecord> - tracks Claude instances created via API
technical_details.terminal_server_instances: Map<string, TerminalSession> - tracks WebSocket terminal sessions
technical_details.isolation_cause: No shared data layer between servers

failure_symptoms: Instance created on port 3000 not visible on port 3002
WebSocket connections fail for instances created via HTTP API
Terminal sessions exist without corresponding Claude instances
Status updates lost between servers

simple_backend.line_17: const activeProcesses = new Map(); // instanceId → process info
simple_backend.line_20: const instances = new Map(); // Track all created instances dynamically

terminal_server.line_62: const terminals = new Map(); // Terminal session management

cross_port_instance_isolation.user_impact: High - instances appear to be created but cannot be accessed via terminal
detection_patterns: Instance ID exists in HTTP API but WebSocket connection fails
Terminal connection established but no corresponding Claude instance

websocket_send_undefined.description: WebSocket 'send is not defined' error occurs when frontend calls missing WebSocket method

technical_details.cause: Missing WebSocket send method wrapper or incorrect method reference

failure_symptoms: TypeError: send is not a function
Input commands not transmitted to terminal
WebSocket connection appears active but input fails
Console error on every input attempt

frontend.line_413: send(input); // ERROR: send method not defined

websocket_send_undefined.user_impact: Critical - users cannot send commands to Claude instances
detection_patterns: Commands typed but no response from Claude
WebSocket connection successful but input fails

instance_stuck_starting.description: Claude instances remain in 'starting' state indefinitely due to cross-server status sync failures

technical_details.status_flow: simple-backend sets 'starting' → WebSocket should update to 'running'
technical_details.broken_link: No mechanism to sync status between port 3000 and 3002
technical_details.timeout_handling: Missing status timeout detection in simple-backend.js

failure_symptoms: Instance status remains 'starting' for minutes
No terminal output despite process being running
Process exists in system but UI shows starting state
Users wait indefinitely for instance to be ready
instance_stuck_starting.user_impact: Medium - instances work but appear broken to users
detection_patterns: Process PID exists but UI shows starting
No status broadcast from terminal server

terminal_io_streaming_gaps.description: Terminal I/O streaming breaks when switching between HTTP SSE and WebSocket protocols

technical_details.protocol_mismatch: Frontend attempts SSE connection for WebSocket terminal data
technical_details.buffer_isolation: Output buffers not shared between servers

failure_symptoms: No terminal output visible in frontend
Commands sent but no response displayed
Output appears in server logs but not in UI
Mixed protocol confusion - SSE expected, WebSocket provided
terminal_io_streaming_gaps.user_impact: Critical - users see no feedback from Claude commands
detection_patterns: Empty terminal output despite running processes
Server logs show output but frontend displays nothing
WebSocket data events not reaching frontend output handlers

navigation_websocket_state_break.description: Browser navigation/refresh breaks WebSocket connections without proper cleanup and reconnection

technical_details.reconnection_logic: Missing automatic reconnection on component remount
technical_details.state_persistence: Instance selection state lost on navigation
technical_details.websocket_cleanup: Proper cleanup exists but reconnection incomplete

failure_symptoms: Terminal connections lost after browser refresh
Selected instance resets to null after navigation
WebSocket connections not automatically restored
Users must manually reselect instances after page reload
detection_patterns: WebSocket readyState changes from OPEN to CLOSED on navigation
Selected instance state becomes null after refresh
No automatic reconnection attempts in network tab

multi_server_coordination.problem: No coordination layer between HTTP API server (3000) and WebSocket server (3002)
multi_server_coordination.impact: Instance creation and terminal access are disconnected
multi_server_coordination.solution_needed: Shared data layer or inter-server communication

protocol_mixing.problem: Frontend designed for SSE but terminal server uses WebSocket
protocol_mixing.solution_needed: Standardize on single protocol or proper protocol detection

state_synchronization.problem: Instance states not synchronized between servers
state_synchronization.solution_needed: Event-driven state sync or shared state store

cross_port_failure: fetch('/api/claude/instances') succeeds but WebSocket connection fails
Instance appears in HTTP response but not in WebSocket terminal list
websocket_method_error: TypeError: send is not a function
WebSocket connection established but commands fail
Browser console shows undefined method errors
status_sync_failure: Instance stuck in 'starting' state for >30 seconds
Process PID exists but UI shows wrong status
Status updates missing between protocol boundaries
io_streaming_break: Server logs show process output but frontend displays empty terminal
Commands acknowledged by server but no response in UI
WebSocket data events not triggering frontend updates
navigation_state_loss: Selected instance becomes null after page refresh
Users must manually reconnect after navigation
